modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks non-English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be a few minor typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Classroom computer not powering on, blinking red and white LED.

full_description_text: The classroom computer is not turning on. There is a blinking red and white light on the power button. The user is unsure what this means and needs help.
short_description: Classroom computer not powering on, blinking red and white LED.
description: The classroom computer is not turning on. There is a blinking red and white light on the power button. The user is unsure what this means and needs help.
